examples: Strychnine is used to kill rodents and pyrrolizidine alkaloids have significant activity against microbes.

Working with Pelletier, he isolated quinine, strychnine, brucine, cinchonine, veratrine, and colchicine, some of which became widely used as drugs.
She died an agonising and slow death at home which, though it was never proved, bore all the hallmarks of poisoning by strychnine.
The last person to be hanged at Hull Prison was Ethel Major in 1934, who was convicted of killing her husband Arthur by poisoning his corned beef with strychnine.
